summary: Reportes > Ventas Module Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed covering all 4 endpoints (summary, by-day, top, filter-options). Frontend: Page renders correctly with KPI cards, daily chart, filter dropdowns, tabs, and top rankings table.
passed_tests: 1. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/summary?range=YTD returns kpis, yoy, yoy_pct ✓
2. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/summary?range=MTD returns different date range ✓
3. Backend: Filter by tienda works - GET /api/reportes/ventas/summary?tienda=BOOSH ✓
4. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/by-day?range=YTD returns current and previous arrays ✓
11. Frontend: KPI cards display (Ventas, Unidades, Órdenes, Clientes with YoY%) ✓
12. Frontend: Daily chart renders with Actual vs Año anterior series ✓
13. Frontend: Sidebar shows Reportes section with Ventas sub-item ✓
14. Frontend: Filter dropdowns render (YTD, Vendedor, Tienda, Marca, etc.) ✓
15. Frontend: Top tab shows ranked table with 20 client results ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reportes.py: All 4 endpoints properly implemented with YoY calculation, filters, and materialized view usage
Backend uses crm.mv_ventas_reporte materialized view for fast aggregation (~0.7s per endpoint)
Frontend ReportesVentasPage.jsx: Clean implementation with KPI cards, recharts chart, tabs, filters
Proper data-testid attributes added for testability
Sidebar Layout.jsx has Reportes submenu group with Ventas child
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data via materialized view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reportes > Ventas module fully functional. Backend uses mv_ventas_reporte materialized view for performance. Frontend page at /reportes/ventas with 2 tabs (Resumen/Top). KPIs show ~S/1.1M YTD with YoY comparison. Filter dropdowns load from /filter-options endpoint. Top rankings support grouping by clientes/modelos/tiendas/items/tallas/colores with CSV export.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Feature implemented correctly.
